name: Option Package
description: Phase 175 — for the active document's design-option sets, generate a per-option deliverable package: option-isolation 3D views, per-option schedule clones, primary-only clash view, and a comparison audit. Run before issuing client decision packs.

steps.label: Take a baseline snapshot of all option sets
Audit schedules / ghost tags / sheet hints
Clone the active schedule per option (interactive)
Export per-option BOQ + carbon comparison (CSV + HTML)
Fix any anomalies introduced by per-option work
Validate ISO 19650 compliance after option work
Bundle outputs into a transmittable briefcase
